title: FZU AV CR Silicon Single Crystal C
description: A sample of a silicon single crystal presented during a tour of the Department of Thin Films and Nanostructures in the Solid State Physics Section at the Institute of Physics of the Czech Academy of Sciences, located on the grounds of the former Czechoslovak Sugar Industry Research Institute in Prague-Střešovice (at the address: Cukrovarnická 112/10)
author: Mojmir Churavy
attribution_md:
FZU AV CR Silicon Single Crystal C
A sample of a silicon single crystal presented during a tour of the Department of Thin Films and Nanostructures in the Solid State Physics Section at the Institute of Physics of the Czech Academy of Sciences, located on the grounds of the former Czechoslovak Sugar Industry Research Institute in Prague-Střešovice (at the address: Cukrovarnická 112/10)
